title: Hymenocharis orbiculata
taxonomy: Hymenocharis orbiculata is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is further classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Cranichideae. The genus Hymenocharis is part of the subtribe Goodyerinae. The classification of Hymenocharis orbiculata provides insight into its evolutionary history and relationships with other orchids.

intro: Hymenocharis orbiculata, commonly known as the "Heartleaf Orchid," is a perennial plant species belonging to the orchid family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Bioactive constituents of Hymenocharis orbiculata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
